Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And To Compel Further Discovery Responses; Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points Authorities In Support Thereof; Proposed Order
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. ROBERT F. WALLACE, ESQ. of Access Legal Services (Tel: 510-891-9900) appearing for plaintiff Melissa Goddard;
Atty. SHIRLEY C. WANG, ESQ. of Davis Wang (Tel: 415-278-1400) appearing for defendant Hearsay Social, Inc.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MELISSA GOODDARD's Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And To Compel Further Discovery Responses.

The Court and counsel discuss the setting of dates for previously noticed depositions. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted in full. Plaintiff's motion to compel attendance at depositions is granted. Plaintiff's motion for sanctions is granted in the amount of $1,500. The Court signs an order which includes the setting of specific deposition dates for Marissa Lui, Melissa Goddard and PMK Kristen Trubey as agreed to by the parties and sets a March 30, 2020 deadline for the completion of all depositions of persons listed in the order. The Court instructs counsel to inform the judge pro tem hearing a discovery motion in this case in Dept. 301/Discovery this morning that that motion is now off calendar.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
